title: Add info-file and cover features to write_btor

features.name: assume property statement in combinational process
features.description: Code should include an assume property statement within an always @* combinational process

features.name: assert property statement in combinational process
features.description: Code should include an assert property statement within an always @* combinational process

features.name: cover property statement in combinational process
features.description: Code should include cover property statements within an always @* combinational process

features.name: mixed edge polarity clocked always blocks
features.description: Code should include always blocks with mixed edge polarities (posedge and negedge) across multiple clock signals
